reference: Hi, my son is three years old and has been unwell. He keeps burning up, and Calpol is not helping. He is complaining that his head is hurting and also his stomach. He vomited earlier but is off his food, and I am kind of forcing him to sip fluids. What could be wrong? Does he need to see somebody?
text: Hi, my son is 3 years old and 11. He keeps burning up, and Pau-Pau is not helping. He is complaining that his head is hurting and also his stomach. He vomited earlier, but it's off his food, and I am kind of forcing him to sip fluids. What could be wrong? Does he need to see somebody?
